testFiles.description: Unit tests for all five volumetric shape generators

tests.name: sphereVolume generator returns Float32Array with length 3 × pointCount
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: sphereVolume generator produces non-zero spread in X, Y, and Z independently
tests.acceptance_criteria: Base geometry occupies non-zero volume in X, Y, and Z

tests.name: sphereVolume generator produces non-coplanar points
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry is not constrained to a single plane

tests.name: sphereVolume generator is deterministic with same seed
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: sphereVolume generator produces different output for different seeds
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: shell generator produces non-coplanar points
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry is not constrained to a single plane

tests.name: shell generator is deterministic with same seed
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: shell generator produces different output for different seeds
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.acceptance_criteria: Base geometry occupies non-zero volume in X, Y, and Z

tests.name: noiseLattice generator produces non-coplanar points
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry is not constrained to a single plane

tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: noiseLattice generator produces different output for different seeds

tests.name: spiralField generator returns Float32Array with length 3 × pointCount
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: spiralField generator produces non-zero spread in X, Y, and Z independently
tests.acceptance_criteria: Base geometry occupies non-zero volume in X, Y, and Z

tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: pointCount=0 returns empty Float32Array
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: pointCount=1 returns a valid 3D point (length 3, no NaN)
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: all generators produce bounding box with non-zero range in X, Y, and Z
tests.acceptance_criteria: Base geometry occupies non-zero volume in X, Y, and Z

tests.name: no NaN values in any generator output
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: no Infinity values in any generator output
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

tests.name: no localStorage or cookie access during generation
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space

testFiles.description: Integration tests for point cloud with volumetric geometry (appended to existing US-031 test file)

tests.name: init() produces volumetric geometry with Z-depth > 1.0 after generator integration
tests.acceptance_criteria: Base geometry occupies non-zero volume in X, Y, and Z

tests.name: init() produces non-coplanar points after generator integration
tests.acceptance_criteria: Geometry is not constrained to a single plane

tests.name: different seeds can produce different generator shapes
tests.acceptance_criteria: Depth is visible through parallax when camera moves

tests.name: determinism preserved after generator integration
tests.acceptance_criteria: Point positions are generated in 3D space
